content: The incomplete, iteratively expanding search-based knowledge structure used to explore 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent memory itself can be framed as an emergent active learning agent that is curiosity-driven to expand its own memory of the domain. This meta-agent prioritizes exploring unrecorded knowledge gaps (the missing search findings marked as 【搜索发现】) just as a 2024 SOTA active learning agent prioritizes querying unlabeled data points that reduce its memory uncertainty.
